text.title: Stripe Webhook Hardening Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Are preconditions satisfied: webhook in prod, secret manager available, edge controls configurable, audit destination exists?

conclusion.verdict: missing preconditions; delay hardening until launch or route to enterprise WAF playbook
lower tolerance to 5 minutes; fix clock drift at infra

branch.question: Is secret rotation cadence <= 90 days with a documented runbook?

conclusion.verdict: schedule rotation; land runbook in repo

branch.question: Is edge layer rate-limited at the endpoint?

conclusion.verdict: configure rate limit at 200 rpm per IP
wire audit log for failed verifications

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
